harness.context_description:
This is taking place in 1982 Menlo Park among the boom in computers at a
RadioShack in a mall. The Radioshack has cheap consumer products and the mall
is 1970s style. The people walking around it are normal middle class people.

timing_breakdown.action: Orion drags his hand along the side of a Tandy CoCo 2

full_prompt:
Context: This is taking place in 1982 Menlo Park among the boom in computers at a
RadioShack in a mall. The Radioshack has cheap consumer products and the mall
is 1970s style. The people walking around it are normal middle class people.. Film stock: 35mm film grain. Color palette: cinematic. Lighting: cinematic. Era: modern. Mood: neutral. medium shot. 0:00-0:03: Orion drags his hand along the side of a Tandy CoCo 2.
composite_prompt: Background: 3. **Back of the AMC Eagle**: the cargo area of a vehicle used to transport the heavy Compaq computer, mentioned as the place where the equipment is tossed or dragged., Orion - a 30 year old man with a long beard. He is contemplative and a professional, Tandy CoCo 2 - early 1980s home computer, TRS-80 Color Computer 2, beige all-in-one keyboard unit with integrated motherboard, budget-priced at $160
